title: Unrelated Bundle
description: Bundles that have nothing to do with what was added in Minecraft 1.21.2.
body:
This MOD adds a bundle, but it is completely unrelated to the bundles added in Minecraft 1.21.2.

This MOD was created using Mcreator. I thought about testing whether it could be replicated in Mcreator, and when I tried to replicate it, it ended up being more convenient than the original.
Bundle

Has 4 slots.

Iron bundle

Has 6 slots.

Gold bundle

Has 9 slots.
Netherite bundle

Has 16 slots.
